description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a camouflage-patterned stock and a thumbhole grip, designed for stability and precision. The stock appears to be made of a synthetic material with a green and brown camouflage finish, extending to the butt and fore-end. The barrel is long and slender, likely made of blued or matte-finished steel, and extends well past the stock. The rifle features a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. Iron sights are present, with a front post and a rear notch, but no optical scope is mounted. The overall design suggests a modern sporting or tactical rifle suitable for urban or field use.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a camouflage-patterned thumbhole stock, long steel barrel, and detachable box magazine. Features iron sights and a modern tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, camouflage stock, thumbhole grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the camouflage stock, thumbhole grip, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttstock and the slim profile of the rifle.
